title: ZARVICZONIA Large Plastic Dish Drainer and Cutlery Rack Kitchen Sink Utensil Holder Draining Cup and Cutlery Drip Plate Worktop Storage Organizer Grey, Black, Cream (48 x 39 x 12 cm) (Cream)
features: Introducing our stylish and practical dish drainer, designed to streamline your kitchen tasks. This versatile drainer is ideal for draining plates, dishes, cutlery, and other items, providing you with a convenient and organized space

With a capacity to hold up to twelve plates, along with a large flat area for cups and glasses, this dish drainer offers ample space for your kitchen essentials. It also features three handy cutlery drainer compartments, ensuring everything has its designated place.

Measuring 48cm wide, 12cm high, and 39cm deep, this drainer is designed to fit perfectly near your sink or inside drawers and cupboards. The base is equipped with drainage holes to facilitate water flow, keeping your dishes dry and clean.
Crafted from strong and durable plastic, this dish drainer is built to withstand daily use. It is easy to maintain, dishwasher safe, and offers a practical solution for drying or storing utensils.

Upgrade your kitchen organization with our efficient and reliable plastic dish drainer. Experience the convenience it brings to your daily routine, ensuring a tidy and clutter-free sink area. Choose from our range of attractive colors to suit your style. Enhance your kitchen functionality with this essential accessory today.
